name: Dividend Yield Calculator
description: Calculate dividend yield as a percentage of the share price.
formulaDescription: Shows how much dividend income you get relative to share price.

example.explanation: A ₹5 annual dividend on a ₹100 stock is a 5% yield.

faqs.question: Does yield change with market price?
faqs.answer: Yes, dividend yield rises if price falls (and vice versa) assuming dividend stays the same.
